note_evidence: # Clinical Note — Annual Wellness Visit
rationale: Note documents an annual comprehensive health examination.

note_evidence: reports feeling mostly well since her last visit
rationale: Directly stated.

note_evidence: Currently asymptomatic. Symptoms are worse in winter.
rationale: Asymptomatic and winter worsening present, but summer/warmth relief not documented.

note_evidence: Uses naproxen 220 mg PRN, one tablet with breakfast, sometimes none for weeks
rationale: Drug, dose, PRN with breakfast, food, and indication all documented.

note_evidence: Denies GI burning, black stools, or knee swelling
rationale: All three denials documented.

note_evidence: Denies chest pain, shortness of breath, palpitations
rationale: All three denials documented.

note_evidence: walking to and from the market (~15 minutes each way, uphill on return)
rationale: Walking activity with duration and uphill return, active without limitation.

note_evidence: Denies dizziness, headaches, vision changes, numbness
rationale: All four denials documented.

note_evidence: Sleeps well until ~5 a.m., then experiences ~20 minutes of worry ... before rising
rationale: Early morning waking with worry ~20 min and good appetite documented.

note_evidence: Denies anhedonia and depressed mood over the past two weeks
rationale: Negative depression screen entailed but PHQ-2 name and score 0 not stated.

note_evidence: GAD-7 score reported as 5 (mild)
rationale: Instrument, score, and mild interpretation documented.

note_evidence: Denies any current abuse, intimidation, or coercion ... Reports feeling safe in her current household.
rationale: Negative abuse screen and safety documented but HARK name/score 0 not stated.

note_evidence: prior history of an abusive first husband ("another lifetime," no longer in her life)
rationale: Past IPV with first husband, no current presence documented.

note_evidence: Former smoker; ~2 years as a teenager, quit ~50 years ago
rationale: Ex-smoker, teenage use, quit ~50 years ago documented.

note_evidence: Alcohol: A small cup of wine at Christmas ... drug screen negative
rationale: Minimal alcohol and negative drug screen documented but DAST-10 name/score 0 not stated.

note_evidence: Medications (reconciled): - Naproxen 220 mg PO PRN with food ... OTC: Chamomile (manzanilla) tea
rationale: Reconciliation completed with only naproxen and chamomile tea.

note_evidence: Elevated blood pressure — 135/82; above optimal but not requiring pharmacotherapy
rationale: Value, mild elevation, and no medication documented.

note_evidence: HR: 60 bpm, regular ... RR: 12
rationale: Heart rate and respiratory rate documented.

note_evidence: Weight: 73.8 kg (down from prior 78 kg) ... BMI: 27.7
rationale: Weight, trend, and BMI documented.

note_evidence: HbA1c: 6.11% (prediabetes, stable)
rationale: Value and interpretation documented.

note_evidence: Fasting glucose: 79 mg/dL
rationale: Glucose value 79 mg/dL documented.

note_evidence: Creatinine: 0.68 mg/dL
rationale: Value documented with normal renal function implied.

note_evidence: Sodium: 138 | Potassium: 3.9
rationale: Both values documented.

note_evidence: Total cholesterol: 168 | LDL: 87 | HDL: 59 | Triglycerides: 110 ... Excellent control
rationale: All lipid values and good control documented.

note_evidence: Hemoglobin: 16.9 | Hematocrit: 47.6 ... Platelets: 351 | WBC: 7.4 ... Prior history of anemia — Resolved
rationale: All CBC values and resolved anemia documented.

note_evidence: Gingiva puffy along the lower gumline with mild bleeding to touch. Consistent with gingivitis.
rationale: Gingivitis with swelling and bleeding documented.

note_evidence: Referred to dentist for cleaning/evaluation
rationale: Dental referral for cleaning documented.

note_evidence: Advised to brush twice daily with a soft brush and continue brushing despite mild bleeding, expected to improve within a couple of weeks
rationale: Oral hygiene counseling documented.

note_evidence: Trivalent influenza vaccine administered today, left deltoid
rationale: Trivalent influenza vaccine in left arm documented.
No handwashing/sleep infection-prevention counseling documented.

note_evidence: primary daytime caregiver for her daughter and three grandchildren ... socially constricted life ... "my world got small"
rationale: Caregiver role and social isolation documented but household size of 5 and contact frequency not stated.
Refugee status, language, education, employment, insurance, and housing not documented.
No 0/10 pain severity score documented.

note_evidence: Recheck HbA1c at next annual visit ... Continue market walks and portion-controlled diet (measured rice) ... Continue current dietary measures (oatmeal
rationale: Annual follow-up and lifestyle measures documented.

note_evidence: counseled to report if worry becomes persistent, interferes with sleep beyond current pattern, or persists through the day
rationale: Anxiety return precautions documented.
No PRAPARE stress finding or resolved status documented.
